meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop starting and start shipping. Learn how to generate passive income and beat project stagnation using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert guide.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is feature creep and lack of automated revenue loops. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature implementation, you can pivot to a 'shipping-first' model that prioritizes monetization, turning your stagnant codebases into passive income-generating SaaS assets.
content.intro:
Your desktop is a graveyard of half-baked ideas: abandoned repositories, incomplete landing pages, and the ghostly remains of 'the next big thing.' You have the vision, but the technical friction of building from scratch keeps you trapped in an endless loop of planning, never shipping. The high cost of perfectionism is your greatest enemy.

True founders don't build perfect; they build profitable. By integrating AI-agentic workflows like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can collapse months of development into days. This isn't just about finishing; it's about building a machine that earns while you sleep. Let’s turn your unfinished projects into recurring revenue.

steps.title: Define the Minimum Monetizable Feature
steps.description: Identify the one feature users will pay for immediately. We strip away the fluff and focus purely on the value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project scope. Identify the singular feature that provides the most immediate value to a paying user. Generate a lean architectural plan that excludes all non-essential 'nice-to-have' features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the project to isolate the core value feature and remove all unused boilerplate code.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Data Layer
steps.description: Establish a robust database schema that supports subscription-based billing without complex backend overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a SaaS platform using Supabase. Include tables for users, subscription_plans, and usage_logs. Ensure the schema is optimized for Stripe integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create migration scripts for the user and subscription tables based on the provided schema.'

steps.title: Automate Revenue Integration
steps.description: Implement Stripe webhooks to handle payments. This turns your project into a passive income machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure serverless function to handle Stripe webhook events for successful payments. Map payment status to database user access levels.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the Stripe webhook endpoint and test the payment flow with a mock event.'

steps.title: Deploy the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate for a full-stack deployment, ensuring everything is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js boilerplate with Tailwind CSS and authentication pre-configured. Ensure all API routes are secured.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy the current codebase to Vercel and verify the environment variables are set correctly.'

steps.title: Continuous Feedback Loop
steps.description: Set up automated monitoring to fix bugs before they kill your conversion rate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated log monitoring script that alerts via email if critical errors occur in the production API routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add logging and error handling to all critical API routes.'

pro_tips: Never build an auth system from scratch; use Clerk or Supabase Auth to save 40 hours of development.
Ship the 'Pay' button before you build the 'Success' page to validate actual user intent.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment logic, not your UI components.
Prioritize mobile-first design; 70% of your initial traffic will likely come from social media links.
Treat your codebase like a product, not a craft; if a feature doesn't drive revenue, delete it.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on driving 100 targeted visitors to your landing page. If you don't get a conversion, iterate on the marketing copy, not the code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop dreaming and start earning. Don't let another project gather digital dust while your competitors ship. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
